$comment: WS33 audit gate 6 — pnpm audit --prod --audit-level=high allow-list. Empty baseline at WS33 landing. Add entries with structured { advisoryId, package, severity, reason, expires, owner }. Default expiry: 90 days for High, 30 for Critical.

advisories.reason: Transitive via fastembed@2.1.0 (tar@^6.2.0 dep) for ONNX model extraction. No tar@6.x backport exists; overriding to tar@7.x breaks fastembed's ESM default-import at runtime (tar@7 is ESM-only, no default export). Tarball fetched over HTTPS from huggingface.co model registry — no attacker-controlled paths. Unblock when fastembed releases a tar@7-compatible build.
